name: BB:HostDefinition: SNMP Sender or Receiver
notes: Edit this BB to define SNMP senders or receivers. This BB is used in conjunction with the BB:PortDefinition: SNMP Ports building block.
bb_references: BB:HostDefinition: SNMP Sender or Receiver on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when a flow or an event matches any of the following BB:PortDefinition: SNMP Ports
when the destination IP is one of the following 127.0.0.2
TD_list: APPLY BB:HostDefinition: SNMP Sender or Receiver on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when a flow or an event matches any of the following BB:PortDefinition: SNMP Ports
AND when the destination IP is one of the following 127.0.0.2
